# rhcs_ocm_role_link (Resource)

Link an OCM role to an OCM organization



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `role_arn` (String) ARN of the AWS IAM role to link to the organization. The role must exist prior to linking and should follow the OCM role pattern. For more information, follow the documentation for the offering.

### Read-Only

- `organization_id` (String) OCM organization ID (automatically determined from the current user)
